---
title: "Core Concepts in Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods"
description: "Synthesis note on recurring concepts in Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods."
book_id: "qualitative-research-evaluation-methods"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Synthesis"
citation_key: "patton_2015_qualitative_research_evaluation_methods"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod08-module-8-integrating-the-12-strategic-qualitative-principles-in-practice-chapter:c0010"
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod20-module-20-practical-purposes-concrete-questions-and-actionable-answers-illuminat:c0005"
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod23-module-23-evaluating-program-models-and-theories-of-change-and-evaluation-models:c0024"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This synthesis draws across the generated notes for *Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods* [@patton_2015_qualitative_research_evaluation_methods].

## Central Logic

Qualitative inquiry is strongest when it is systematic, open to field realities, and connected to practical questions users need answered.

## Concepts

- Qualitative inquiry: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Strategic qualitative principles: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Utilization-focused inquiry: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Case study: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Implementation and process evidence: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Theory of change clarification: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.

## Links

- [Strategic Qualitative Principles in Practice](section-01-strategic-qualitative-principles.qmd)
- [Practical and Actionable Qualitative Inquiry](section-02-practical-actionable-qualitative-inquiry.qmd)
- [Program Models, Theories of Change, and Qualitative Methods](section-03-program-models-and-theories-of-change.qmd)

## References
